creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Martin,

I compiled your port (7.0.1) using Poudriere (12.1-RELEASE) and found a few issues.

MASTER_SITES is wrong, it should say SF/hylafax/hylafax which in turns requires a re-run of "make makesum"

While at it, please bump it to 7.0.2 as it seems to fix compatibiliy issues with (lib)tiff 4.1 which currently is in tree.
https://hylafax.sourceforge.io/news/7.0.2.php

DISTFILE can also theoretically clash with comms/hylafax so please set DIST_SUBDIR to avoid that issue.
https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/makefile-distfiles.html --> 5.4.10

Please check if you can remove manual references of LOCALBASES with USES= localbase instead. https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/uses-localbase.html ?

USES= ssl is missing (it links to ssl)

stage-qa also warns about this:
Warning: /wrkdirs/usr/ports/comms/hylafax+/work/pkg-message not in UCL format, will be shown on initial install only.

# Defaults to "North American Letter".  Use "ISO A4" for A4. <-- It would be much more user friendly if it were a menu toggle (OPTIONS_SINGLE)
https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/makefile-options.html

Also, when uploading a patch please select that it deprecates previous ones.

Great work!

Best regards,
Daniel
